tokens.name: --background
tokens.description: Base surface color (panels, bubbles read it via bg-background).

tokens.name: --foreground
tokens.description: Default text color on --background.

tokens.name: --card
tokens.description: Elevated card surface.

tokens.name: --card-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --card.

tokens.name: --popover
tokens.description: Floating surface base (popover / menu / select / dialog).

tokens.name: --popover-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --popover.

tokens.name: --primary
tokens.description: THE brand color; primary action surfaces route through it.

tokens.name: --primary-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --primary.

tokens.name: --primary-text
tokens.description: Readable brand text color on base and card surfaces.

tokens.name: --muted
tokens.description: Subdued fill for quiet surfaces.

tokens.name: --muted-foreground
tokens.description: Secondary / meta text color.

tokens.name: --secondary
tokens.description: Secondary action fill (assistant bubble in chat skins).

tokens.name: --secondary-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --secondary.

tokens.name: --accent
tokens.description: Hover / selection highlight fill.

tokens.name: --accent-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --accent.

tokens.name: --destructive
tokens.description: Destructive action color.

tokens.name: --destructive-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on --destructive.

tokens.name: --destructive-text
tokens.description: Readable destructive text color on base and card surfaces.

tokens.name: --border
tokens.description: Hairline border color (carries --ring-opacity).

tokens.name: --input
tokens.description: Form field border color.

tokens.name: --ring
tokens.description: Focus ring color.

tokens.name: --canvas
tokens.description: The page paper the scene/panels float on — a level BELOW --background.

tokens.name: --ring-opacity
tokens.description: Alpha of the border/ring hairlines; 0 = borderless.

tokens.name: --popup-item-foreground
tokens.description: Text color of popup (menu/select) rows.

tokens.name: --popup-item-highlight-background
tokens.description: Highlighted or selected popup row fill.

tokens.name: --badge-neutral
tokens.description: Soft neutral-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-neutral-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the neutral-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-neutral-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline neutral-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-neutral-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled neutral-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-red
tokens.description: Soft red-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-red-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the red-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-red-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline red-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-red-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled red-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-orange
tokens.description: Soft orange-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-orange-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the orange-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-orange-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline orange-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-orange-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled orange-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-yellow
tokens.description: Soft yellow-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-yellow-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the yellow-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-yellow-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline yellow-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-yellow-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled yellow-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-green
tokens.description: Soft green-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-green-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the green-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-green-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline green-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-green-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled green-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-blue
tokens.description: Soft blue-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-blue-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the blue-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-blue-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline blue-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-blue-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled blue-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-purple
tokens.description: Soft purple-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-purple-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the purple-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-purple-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline purple-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-purple-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled purple-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --badge-pink
tokens.description: Soft pink-family badge background; the skin owns the exact hue.

tokens.name: --badge-pink-foreground
tokens.description: Text color on the pink-family badge.

tokens.name: --badge-pink-border
tokens.description: Border of the outline pink-family badge variant.

tokens.name: --badge-pink-hover
tokens.description: Hover background of filled pink-family badge links and buttons.

tokens.name: --font-sans
tokens.description: Typeface for the whole UI.

tokens.name: --font-mono
tokens.description: Monospace face (code, kbd).

tokens.name: --font-body
tokens.description: Font ROLE for body/UI text; defaults to --font-sans.

tokens.name: --font-display
tokens.description: Font ROLE for headings; defaults to --font-sans.

tokens.name: --text-micro
tokens.description: 10px rung — kbd, badge counters, dense numeric meta.

tokens.name: --text-caption
tokens.description: 11px rung — overlines, timestamps, group labels.

tokens.name: --text-label
tokens.description: 12px rung — form labels + small chrome.

tokens.name: --text-body
tokens.description: 14px rung — DEFAULT body & control text.

tokens.name: --text-body-lg
tokens.description: 16px rung — emphasized / larger body.

tokens.name: --text-heading-4
tokens.description: Smallest heading rung (15px).

tokens.name: --text-heading-4--line-height
tokens.description: Line-height paired onto text-heading-4.

tokens.name: --text-heading-4--font-weight
tokens.description: Weight paired onto text-heading-4.

tokens.name: --text-heading-3
tokens.description: Heading rung (18px).

tokens.name: --text-heading-3--line-height
tokens.description: Line-height paired onto text-heading-3.

tokens.name: --text-heading-3--font-weight
tokens.description: Weight paired onto text-heading-3.

tokens.name: --text-heading-2
tokens.description: Heading rung (22px).

tokens.name: --text-heading-2--line-height
tokens.description: Line-height paired onto text-heading-2.

tokens.name: --text-heading-2--font-weight
tokens.description: Weight paired onto text-heading-2.

tokens.name: --text-heading-1
tokens.description: Largest content heading (30px — in-page / markdown h1).

tokens.name: --text-heading-1--line-height
tokens.description: Line-height paired onto text-heading-1.

tokens.name: --text-heading-1--font-weight
tokens.description: Weight paired onto text-heading-1.

tokens.name: --text-heading-1--letter-spacing
tokens.description: Tracking paired onto text-heading-1.

tokens.name: --text-display
tokens.description: Display rung above h1 (36px — page titles, heroes).

tokens.name: --text-display--line-height
tokens.description: Line-height paired onto text-display.

tokens.name: --text-display--font-weight
tokens.description: Weight paired onto text-display.

tokens.name: --text-display--letter-spacing
tokens.description: Tracking paired onto text-display.

tokens.name: --text-meta
tokens.description: Legacy alias of --text-caption (11px).

tokens.name: --radius
tokens.description: THE single radius knob; the whole scale multiplies from it.

tokens.name: --radius-control
tokens.description: Shared control corner (button, trigger, field, chip); ×2 from --radius.

tokens.name: --radius-sm
tokens.description: Scale rung: --radius × 0.6.

tokens.name: --radius-md
tokens.description: Scale rung: --radius × 0.8.

tokens.name: --radius-lg
tokens.description: Scale rung: --radius × 1.

tokens.name: --radius-xl
tokens.description: Scale rung: --radius × 1.4.

tokens.name: --radius-2xl
tokens.description: Scale rung: --radius × 1.6.

tokens.name: --radius-field
tokens.description: User bubble / composer shell corner; --radius × 2.2.

tokens.name: --radius-panel
tokens.description: Code / markdown panel corner; --radius × 2.6.

tokens.name: --radius-scene
tokens.description: Scene frame / large media corner; --radius × 2.8.

tokens.name: --corner-shape
tokens.description: Progressive corner reshape (round | squircle | scoop | …).

tokens.name: --corner-shape-control
tokens.description: Corner shape for controls; defaults to --corner-shape.

tokens.name: --corner-shape-popover
tokens.description: Corner shape for floating surfaces; defaults to --corner-shape.

tokens.name: --corner-shape-panel
tokens.description: Corner shape for panels; defaults to --corner-shape.

tokens.name: --corner-radius-fit
tokens.description: Fallback radius shrink where corner-shape: squircle is unsupported.

tokens.name: --radius-popup-item
tokens.description: Select/menu row corner; derived from --radius-control.

tokens.name: --radius-popup-item-fit
tokens.description: Row corner clamped to half the row height (browser render cap).

tokens.name: --radius-popover
tokens.description: Popup container corner, concentric with the fitted row corner.

tokens.name: --nest-safe
tokens.description: Sub-pixel guard for rounded children inside clipped rounded containers.

tokens.name: --nest-corner-ratio
tokens.description: Corner-fit ratio (2 + √2) capping panel corners near inset controls.

tokens.name: --shadow-color
tokens.description: Hue every shadow is tinted with.

tokens.name: --shadow-highlight
tokens.description: Inner top light painted along raised surfaces' top edge (carries its resting alpha).

tokens.name: --shadow-size
tokens.description: Global geometry multiplier: 1 = default depth, 0 = flat.

tokens.name: --shadow-opacity
tokens.description: Global alpha multiplier: 1 = default density, 0 = invisible.

tokens.name: --shadow-y
tokens.description: Vertical bias: 0 = centered, 1 = default bottom cast.

tokens.name: --shadow-control-multiplier
tokens.description: Elevation tier: controls.

tokens.name: --shadow-panel-multiplier
tokens.description: Elevation tier: panels.

tokens.name: --shadow-popover-multiplier
tokens.description: Elevation tier: floating popovers.

tokens.name: --shadow-modal-multiplier
tokens.description: Elevation tier: dialogs and sheets.

tokens.name: --shadow-ambient-multiplier
tokens.description: Elevation tier: ambient scene lift.

tokens.name: --ease-standard
tokens.description: Default easing curve for color/text transitions.

tokens.name: --ease-emphasized
tokens.description: Emphasized curve for entrances and larger moves.

tokens.name: --duration-fast
tokens.description: Fast tempo (hover, color).

tokens.name: --duration-base
tokens.description: Base tempo (menus, indicators).

tokens.name: --duration-slow
tokens.description: Slow tempo (panel/message entrances).

tokens.name: --popover-opacity
tokens.description: Floating-surface translucency; <1 + blur = frosted glass.

tokens.name: --backdrop-blur-popover
tokens.description: Backdrop blur behind floating surfaces.

tokens.name: --overlay-opacity
tokens.description: Modal overlay (dialog backdrop) dim strength.

tokens.name: --backdrop-blur-overlay
tokens.description: Backdrop blur of the modal overlay.

tokens.name: --scroll-fade-size
tokens.description: Edge-fade depth of scrollable surfaces; 0 = hard edges.

tokens.name: --popup-item-disabled-opacity
tokens.description: Opacity of disabled popup rows.

tokens.name: --popover-padding
tokens.description: Gap between popup container edge and rows (drives concentric corners).

tokens.name: --padding-x
tokens.description: Horizontal content density of rounded surfaces (bubble, composer).

tokens.name: --padding-y
tokens.description: Vertical content density of rounded surfaces.

tokens.name: --control-h
tokens.description: THE base control height (md); the ramp derives from it.

tokens.name: --control-h-xs
tokens.description: Derived control height: xs (×0.78, px-snapped).

tokens.name: --control-h-sm
tokens.description: Derived control height: sm (×0.89, px-snapped).

tokens.name: --control-h-md
tokens.description: Control height alias for the md base.

tokens.name: --control-h-lg
tokens.description: Derived control height: lg (×1.11, px-snapped).
